commands.name: connect
commands.description: Establishes a connection to a Comfyg store.

arguments.name: connection-string
arguments.description: The connection string used to connect to the Comfyg store.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Setup Comfyg resources.

commands.name: client
commands.description: Registers a new client on the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: CLIENT_ID
arguments.description: The ID of the client to create. This must be unique for the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: FRIENDLY_NAME
arguments.description: The user friendly display name which is used for the created client.

commands.name: localhost
commands.description: Sets up a new Comfyg store on your local machine.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds a key-value pair to the connected Comfyg store.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Adds a key-value pair as a configuration value to the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: KEY
arguments.description: The key of the key-value pair.

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description: The value of the key-value pair.

commands.name: setting
commands.description: Adds a key-value pair as a setting value to the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: KEY
arguments.description: The key of the key-value pair.

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description: The value of the key-value pair.

commands.name: secret
commands.description: Adds a key-value pair as a secret value to the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: KEY
arguments.description: The key of the key-value pair.

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description: The value of the key-value pair.

commands.name: import
commands.description: Imports key-value pairs into the connected Comfyg store.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Imports key-value pairs as configuration values into the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: INPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The input file which will be used to import all key-value pairs from.

commands.name: settings
commands.description: Imports key-value pairs as setting values into the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: INPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The input file which will be used to import all key-value pairs from.

commands.name: secrets
commands.description: Imports key-value pairs as secret values into the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: INPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The input file which will be used to import all key-value pairs from.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Exports key-value pairs from the connected Comfyg store.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Exports key-value pairs from the configuration values of the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: OUTPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The output file which will be used to export key-value pairs into.

commands.name: secrets
commands.description: Exports secret key-value pairs from the secret values of the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: OUTPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The output file which will be used to export key-value pairs into.

commands.name: settings
commands.description: Exports setting key-value pairs from the setting values of the connected Comfyg store.

arguments.name: OUTPUT_FILE
arguments.description: The output file which will be used to export key-value pairs into.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets Comfyg resources.

commands.name: permissions
commands.description: Sets permissions on all permitted key-value pairs for another client.

arguments.name: CLIENT_ID
arguments.description: The ID of the client to set the permissions for.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Sets the permission on a configuration key-value pair for another client.

arguments.name: CLIENT_ID
arguments.description: The ID of the client to set the permission for.

arguments.name: KEY
arguments.description: The key of the key-value pair to set the permission for.

commands.name: secret
commands.description: Sets the permission on a secret key-value pair for another client.

arguments.name: CLIENT_ID
arguments.description: The ID of the client to set the permission for.

arguments.name: KEY
arguments.description: The key of the key-value pair to set the permission for.

commands.name: setting
commands.description: Sets the permission on a setting key-value pair for another client.

arguments.name: CLIENT_ID
arguments.description: The ID of the client to set the permission for.

arguments.name: KEY
arguments.description: The key of the key-value pair to set the permission for.

commands.name: tag
commands.description: Tags a key-valur pair version.

arguments.name: TAG

arguments.name: TAG
